text.message: So not sure why it’s me tbh
just making sure you keep your words
Where else do I block you
i thought we are blocking the leading players
wont have army neither road in the long run no?
you're fighting for road rn lol
seems like black knows it too
I didn't rob you last turn
if you don't want to be blocked, don't play man
ofc no one wants to be blocked
Just out here handing black a city lol
and talking about not liking robbing :D
Oj you let it slip by perma robbing me
block blacks road and i'll give u settle
he can play his roads the other way
It does nothing, he has space
black will win if i dont have road
red traded him the city and he just has road without needing to do anything like i said in the first place anyways
yea my b, I misplayed my mono
and knowing red has knights doesnt matter
